prompt: Create a premium conceptual beverage advertisement for Coca-Cola on a vertical 4:5 canvas, with a deep red studio background and a cold red soda can centered in the frame. The can is covered in realistic condensation droplets, lit like a high-end FMCG product shot, with crisp metallic highlights on the rim, pull tab, and bottom edge. Place the white scripted Coca-Cola logo across the can, with small white text reading “ORIGINAL TASTE” below it. Add a surreal zipper opening across the middle of the composition: a shiny silver zipper runs horizontally from the left edge, crosses the front of the can, then curves upward and outward to the right, with the zipper pull positioned near the center-front of the can. The zipper divides two worlds: on the left, an orange sunset landscape with a glowing sun near the horizon, warm water or flat terrain, and a faint distant city skyline; on the right, an icy blue winter mountain scene with snow-covered pine trees, frosty mountains, mist, and cold condensation. The right zipper flap should look like a curved blue panel peeled open from the red surface, with droplets and zipper teeth along the edge. Use cinematic advertising lighting, ultra-realistic product photography, glossy condensation, shallow studio depth, and a clean Apple-level minimalist composition. Include exactly three visible text groups: top centered slogan “open happiness” with “happiness” in bold, main can logo and “ORIGINAL TASTE,” and bottom centered copy “real magic is inside” with “inside” in bold plus a tiny brand script beneath. No extra text, no people, no clutter, no watermark.
